subject: feat: embedding features and merge commit filtering (items 21-24)
body:
Data URL query param (item 21):
- Accept ?data=<url> to load dashboard data from external URL
- Falls back to ./data.json when param not present
- User-friendly error message on fetch failure

Vite library build (item 22):
- Add vite.config.lib.js for ES module library output
- Add dashboard/js/lib.js entry point exporting App, AppProvider, useApp
- Add npm build:lib script
- React, ReactDOM, Chart.js externalized as peer dependencies

Merge commit filtering (item 24):
- Add --no-merges CLI flag to extract.js
- Applied to both log extraction and numstat extraction commands
- Usage: node extract.js [repo-path] --no-merges

Device attribution research (item 23):
- Git does not store device/platform info natively
- Proxy indicators (email domain, timezone, commit patterns) are weak signals
- Documented as infeasible — removed from active TODO

Tags: embedding, extraction, feature
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: minor
